programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was a tragic twist of fate. Just days after a woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find the bloodied bodies of Elise Makdessi and Navy sailor Quincy Brown. But was Brown Elise's lover or her assailant?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice ... and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja learn of the Forbidden Five's quest to collect the Prismatic Blades, meanwhile Ras finally leads Arin to his parents.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of the Duchy of Blanco has a one-of-a-kind gold coin of Hannibal hidden in his chest; well, Lupin and crew are after it. Amidst their scheming, Jigen is challenged to a duel with a man named Stoneman.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin was told by Fujiko to steal a pistol of the Wilhem family worth 500 million pounds. Meanwhile, a man named Jim Benkei, a giant of a man who's stirred troubled in London, steals Jigen's favorite Magnum ...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make peanut butter. Lady Aberlin agrees to take care of Daphne. Henrietta Pussycat suggests making a daycare center at the factory, and Corney agrees.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets Natasha, a famous oboeist. She shows pictures of her children and says she expresses her feelings for them through her music. Prince Tuesday is considering getting sick so that his parents will stay home from work.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett invites Mister Rogers outside for some exercises. Bruce Franco carries a collection of balloon scuptures he has made for the party. He gives Mister Rogers a balloon sculpture that looks like the Neighborhood Trolley.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a week of programs about the environment. He shows how things can be reused. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, there's a real-life problem -- too much garbage -- and the neighbors are trying to find a solution.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make adhesive bandages. Prince Tuesday is looking for someone to play with but all of his friends are busy. At the suggestion of King Friday, he pretends that his rag doll has come to life.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of wolves "singing," and wolf expert Kent Weber stops by with two wolves and explains that wolves are shy, not big and bad like in the fairy tales, and how they live together in families.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folksinger Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers with her ukulele and shares songs her father enjoyed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Yo-Yo Ma describes how he misses his family when he is gone and plays Bach's Sarabande on his cello. Sitting at the piano, Yo-Yo's son Nicholas plays the Skater's Waltz as a duet with his father.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays with different-sized cardboard tubes. Lady Aberlin is observing how neighbors react to the laughter box. Dr. Maggie Kimmel tells the story of “Button Broth.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of how people make toothbrushes. Lady Aberlin observes the neighbors' reactions after she can turn herself into a tiger. Princess Zelda arrives in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the request of a television neighbor, Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it to travel. Prince Tuesday does not understand why he is not big like Neighbor Aber and King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown. Robert Troll is the only one who can communicate with the “big thing.” He learns that it wants a blanket; the blanket causes it to sprout a stem and leaves.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience. Purple Panda experiments with a powder that causes flowers to grow. Prince Tuesday wishes the powder to make him grow. Mister Rogers goes to see the Harlem Spiritual Ensemble practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Harriett Cow shares the plans for a play. Lady Aberlin is greeted by a ballet dancer who dances her around the Neighborhood. The dancer inspires Ana Platypus to be a ballerina in the school play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains why he changes into a sweater and sneakers, and shows how people make sweaters and sneakers. Miss Paulificate brings Prince Tuesday's ragdoll to life by dancing with him. The neighbors decide their roles in a play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday suggests that the Neighborhood of Make-Believe be turned upside down to see if the missing crown might fall out. Trolley finds the spare crown! Mister Rogers visits the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart is dressed as Mr. McFeely and delivers a film about how people make sweaters. The children put on a play about a princess, a raccoon and a giant king. Prince Tuesday admits he had something to do with the missing crown.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A rash of young men goes missing around Chicago during the 1970s; when bodies start washing up in the river, a pattern emerges; a small piece of evidence leads police to the home of a model citizen, where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Louisiana is terrorized by multiple serial killers; the Zachary Police Department discovers the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware, but after investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After multiple men are discovered brutally murdered, investigators determine that each victim was last seen with a handsome stranger they met in a bar.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After a series of women in the Seattle area are found brutally murdered with their bodies posed, police realize that they might have a killer stalking the area nightclub scene who is able to charm his victims into submission.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police investigate the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer conceals his victims' bodies with trash, discarding them like garbage in the back alleyways of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition gets fierce as the remaining six teams face a double U-Turn, and the Cowboys contemplate a major decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend; they run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.desc: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom heads to Seattle to install crown molding. Roger replaces a rotted fence post. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Kevin explains the difference between cement, concrete, and mortar.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a whole-house humidifier. Kevin and Scott install hardwired smoke and carbon monoxide detectors. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom shows how to remove stripped screws.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger visits Santa Fe to learn about "waffle gardening". Richard adds motorized zone dampers to a forced-air HVAC system. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom shows an easy way to bisect angles.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom repairs a rotted porch post. And the guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard visits New Orleans to help a family deal with high indoor humidity.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom helps a homeowner fit a boxspring mattress up a narrow staircase. The guys ask "What Is It?" Kevin and an electrician repair a light-switch. Richard shows options for filtering drinking water.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard visits a home in Mobile, Alabama and installs a clawfoot tub with shower. Tom installs a permanent fire escape ladder. Thevguys ask "What Is It?" Roger shows the best way to prune trees.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger builds a high tunnel greenhouse. Richard explains the best types of pliers and wrenches. Scott converts recessed lights into pendants. And the guys ask WHAT IS IT?

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps quiet a squealing shower. Kevin installs a DIY-friendly security and safety system. And the guys ask WHAT IS IT?

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows Kevin how to start plants from seed. Richard replaces an outdoor hose spigot with one that will never freeze. Tom builds a moveable kitchen island with Kevin.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps plant a low-cost, low-maintenance privacy screen. Tommy demonstrates many uses for a speed square. Richard uses new technology to seal ductwork from the inside.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps replace a shower valve that shuts off mysteriously. Tom shows how to patch a hole in baseboard. Roger shares some tips for maintaining a lawn mower. And the guys ask "What Is It?"

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: In this special program, the guys celebrate 300 episodes of "Ask This Old House" by looking back at some of their best moments and revealing some behind-the-scenes secrets.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Lighting is being installed outside and preparation for in-floor heat is happening in the primary bathroom. The homeowners pick lighting for the dining room and father and son install drywall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original foundation is repaired. Antique windows are installed in Dracut, MA. The wood floors are patched, and a bathroom is prepped for tile. Aluminum gutters that look like wood are explored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Cabinets and a vent hood are being installed in the kitchen. The homeowners' daughter chooses a paint color for her room. A stained glass window is repaired, and floor tiles are laid out for install.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Countertops are going in and doors are being hung. A local stone fabrication shop is visited. A distressed stained finish is applied to trim. Under-cabinet receptacles and crown molding are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A little over a year ago, the 1890s West Roxbury Victorian was a tired-looking house. Now, it's all dressed up and looking good. The crew and homeowners give a tour of the changes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The team is starting a new project in Saratoga Springs, NY. They meet the homeowners and the builder. Plans for the 1864 home include reconstructing the additions and creating an open floor plan.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowners begin to demo. The architect shares his plan for the home. Richard learns about the Saratoga springs. The yard is protected against construction. An air remediation system is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The Saratoga Racecourse is toured. Discoveries are made during demo. Armored shield cabling is replaced with nonmetallic ones. The home's framing is explored. A buttress wall is built in the basement.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Local gardens are toured. A new foundation is built using ICFs. A mansion once owned by the inventor of a fire hydrant valve is toured. Forms are prepped for a pour-in-place concrete staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original foundation is repointed. Plumbing fixture choices are made. A ledger is installed on the new ICF foundation for the mudroom floor joists. A truss manufacturing facility is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Brick veneer is installed at the Dracut Centre School. The homeowners select cabinets at a local kitchen showroom. Mold and mildew are identified and treated. Kevin takes a hot air balloon ride.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old joists are replaced. Tile selections are made. The old porch is tied into the new framing. Steel I-beams support the open floor plan with no partitions. The roof trusses are installed.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger show deals with rainwater from gutters and downspouts. Richard talks about pliers. The guys ask: "What is it?" and Tom insulates an attic floor using fiberglass batts and blown-in insulation.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin shows a few tricks and techniques for painting an interior wall. The guys ask: "What is it?" and Richard installs a water heater with an electronic valve that prevents floods due to water leaks.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger plants a narrow garden bed near a driveway. The guys conduct home improvement workshops in Memphis, TN, Little Rock, AR, and Tulsa, OK. Richard makes an old fireplace more energy efficient.

programme.desc: Jack, Janet, and Chrissy throw a lavish party to help their landlord snare a luscious blonde.

programme.desc: Jack finds himself in a state of panic when he juggles three gourmet dinners in three different apartments.

programme.desc: Jack believes Chrissy's friend is the perfect sweetie to bring home to mom, until Janet discovers she's a high-priced call girl headed for a wild convention.

programme.desc: Jack snows a stunning skier named Inga into believing he's a downhill champion.

programme.desc: Janet frantically tries to keep Jack and Larry from finding out they are both dating the same beautiful woman.

programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity lands Jack an impressive chef's post that makes him the unwitting target of a bullying bookie and the local police.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Ruslan Provodnikov
programme.desc: On March 16th, 2013, Timothy Bradley fought Ruslan Provodnikov for the WBO Welterweight Title in Carson, California. Provodnikov put up a very strong challenge in an incredible fight, but Bradley prevailed, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Todd Foster vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On August 6th, 1992 Todd Foster fought Jeff Mayweather at Denton Field in Miles City with Mayweather going down in rounds 7 & 8 the bout resulted in a technical knockout victory for Foster.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Dillian Whyte
programme.desc: On April 23rd, 2022 Tyson Fury fought Dillian Whyte for the WBC World Heavyweight title at Wembley Stadium Whyte suffered injuries throughout the fight causing the fight to end by technical knockout in the 4th round giving the bout to Fury.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Tom Schwarz
programme.desc: On June 15th, 2019 Tyson Fury went up against Tom Schwarz for the WBO Intercontinental Heavyweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted two rounds ending by technical knockout securing Fury's win.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Jorge Linares
programme.desc: On May 12th, 2018, Vasiliy Lomachenko fought Jorge Linares for the WBA and Ring Magazine Lightweight Titles at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite being knocked down in round six, Loma was able to stop Linares in the 10th round.

programme.title: Vinny Pazienza vs Roberto Duran 2
programme.desc: On January 14th, 1995 Vinny Pazienza fought Roberto Duran for a second time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for Pazienza.

programme.title: Alexis Arguello vs Alfredo Escalera
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1978 Alexis Arguello fought Alfredo Escalera for the WBC World super featherweight title that ended in the 13th round.

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: On October 18th, 2008 Bernard Hopkins fought Kelly Pavlik at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City ending in a unanimous decision victory for Hopkins.

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 2004, Bernard Hopkins fought Oscar De La Hoya for the undisputed world middleweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. After a quiet first eight rounds, Hopkins finished De La Hoya with a brutal body shot in the ninth round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Miguel Acosta
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2011, Brandon Rios fought Miguel Acosta for the WBA World Lightweight Title at the Palms in Las Vegas. In a great back-and-forth fight, Brandon Rios knocked down Acosta hard, stopping him in the 10th round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Mike Alvarado 1
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2012, Brandon Rios fought Mike Alvarado for the WBO Latino Super Lightweight Title in Carson, California. Showing his quickness and agility, Rios put on a show with a 7th round TKO victory.

programme.title: Chris Eubank vs Nigel Benn 1
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1990, Chris Eubank fought Nigel Benn for the WBO Middleweight Title at the Resorts World Arena in Birmingham, UK. Eubank's constant pressure on Benn and powerful punching led him to stop Benn in the ninth round.

programme.title: Diego Corrales vs Jose Luis Castillo
programme.desc: On May 7th, 2005 Diego Corrales faced Jose Luis Castillo for WBC and WBO World Lightweight titles at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas in a bout that went 10 rounds that ended in technical knockout giving the win to Corrales.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Chris Diaz
programme.desc: On April 24th, 2021 Emanuel Navarrete and Chris Diaz fought for the WBO World Featherweight title at the Silver Spurs Arena, Kissimmee that resulted with a technical knockout in the 12th round securing Navarretes victory.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys' nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After visiting a popular burger restaurant, Willie and Jase get into a debate over which of them cooks the best burger, prompting them to challenge one another to a cooking contest.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old GI Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalog, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep them selves. But when the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road Truckers face their greatest challenges to date. Lisa takes on the biggest haul of her career, and a huge promotion may be on the line. Maya is still stuck under Phil's wing and she's beginning to wonder if he'll ever let her make a solo run.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Rick and Hugh continue their marathon run, but the Winter Roads wreak havoc on the trucks leaving Hugh stuck on the side of the road. Alex comes to the rescue when a local family finds themselves stranded in the wilderness.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As the season reaches the halfway point, drivers are desperate to pull ahead in the dash for the cash. Hugh, Rick, and Alex, struggled to make deliveries to the remote villages of northern Manitoba.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In Alaska, the storm of the decade pounds the Dalton, sending the truckers' hauls into chaos. After her demotion from heavy haul status, Lisa is determined to deliver her load through the blizzard.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Harsh winter weather has left Lisa stranded in Prudhoe Bay. Dave is in a convoy with Maya and Tony, he tests their patience before leaving them behind. In Canada, Rick's frustration reaches a boiling point and he snaps.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Rick face an obstacle that has the ice road blocked, until Hugh decides to clear a path, while Alex gets too close for comfort with a parked car. Dave's trouble with his fuel tank is only the beginning.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's the first warm day of spring and the ice roads are getting dangerously slick. Hugh and Rick hauling tankers with diesel fuel, run into Alex at a fuel stop and decide to convoy north together.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dave Redmon is at odds--yet again--with his bosses, this time over making a rookie error, and Maya faces freezing brakeline issues as she dashes down the melting ice roads.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: It's a new season of Ax Men and a new battle for "king of the mountain." Papac returns as reigning king of the mountain.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power. Using a molecule-freezing device to take Megatron and Starscream out of the picture, the two are free to lead how they see fit.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heatseeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant "teacher" Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: While recovering one of Windblade's hidden caches, the Autobots run into Rescue Bot Blurr.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Bee Team captures a Skunkticonwho's obsessively guarding a strange Sphere-shaped artifact. The curious Sphere bears a more than passing resemblance to a mythical relic that can reveal the location of the lost city of Doradus.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: BLURR continues on as SIDESWIPE's intern while BUMBLEBEE discovers a replacement Decepticon Hunter exists in Windblade's hidden cache on the island town of WEST ROCK CITY. Unfortunately, Stunticons DRAG STRIP and WILDCHASE find the cache first.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots set up base at an old auto-parts shop. Meanwhile, Megatron's head comes back online and takes control of several robots to attack the Autobots and reclaim the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: An engineering genius tampers with Bumblebee's system and causes him to become Meltdown. This wouldn't be half bad except for the fact that Meltdown's touch burns holes in the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Professor Sumdac's latest creations begin to think for themselves. Eventually, these Dinobots start to hunt down the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Ratchet thinks back on the time that he spent in the Autobot-Decepticon War. Meanwhile, he must face his past when an old Decepticon foe appears, the bounty hunter Lockdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Bumblebee faces off against the newest villain, Nanosec.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Bumblebee and Bulkhead are having fun celebrating their first-ever Halloween with Sari. That is, until the Decepticon Blackarachnia shows up to ruin their good times.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The luxury hotel bill is due and Lana Star has come to collect as Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag report for duty at Lana's mansion. Adriana Gambino debuts her new faction, The Alliance, when BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni take on The All American Girls.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones must defeat Penelope Pink in the Main Event to secure a championship match vs The Beast. Over at Lana Star's Fab Four mansion, Big Rig Betty's tired of working for Lana Star, but is surprised to learn that Holly doesn't seem to mind it.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is ready to talk and shares compelling evidence with David McLane about the attack on The Beast in an effort to claim the $10,000 reward money. In the ring, The Mighty Mights face Miami's Sweet Heat for the WOW Tag Team Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In the main event, The Classmaster faces Santana Garrett in order to fulfill the stipulation ladi forth by Matchmaker David McLane - a victory will earn her a chance to challenge The Beast for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones versus Miami Sweet Heat's Lindsey and Laurie Carlson in the main event to determine who retains the alliance of Holly Swag. New Superhero Xena Phoenix makes her WOW debut against Scout Parker.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four is fabber than ever, with the addition of Holly Swag. Holly's determined to put her best foot forward with her new crew in her first match in the Foursome against Ashley Blaze. Valentina Diamante debuts for WOW against Coach Campanelli.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Samantha Smart and The Classmaster to collect on the deal they made with Matchmaker David McLane for the main event with a WOW World Championship match against The Beast.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW roster is reeling from last week's news and the videotape delivered from The Beast when Matchmaker David McLane announces a 12-Woman Battle Royale to crown a new champion.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: New tag team champions Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones celebrate their title reign to kick off an episode full of qualifying matches for the upcoming over-the-top-rope Battle Royal for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Battle Royal for the World Championship approaches as the Superheroes continue to vie to qualify, including Genesis, who faces new Superhero Ashley Blaze. Meanwhile, Xena Phoenix looks forward to continuing her strong start in WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Backed by Alliance members Adriana Gambino, BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni, Reina Del Rey is on a mission to expand the Alliance's hold over WOW with a victory over Foxxy Fierce - and she's vowed to take no prisoners on the roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On the heels of their victory last week, Miami Sweet Heat demands a rematch for the WOW Tag Team Championships as other Superheroes continue to focus on qualifying for the upcoming Battle Royal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Miami Sweet Heat's Lindsey and Laurie Carlson and Animal Instinct's Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx both called "next" on the WOW Tag Team Championships last week, the main event sees a triple confrontation with both teams.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The qualifying matches are over, and twelve competitors are finally ready to compete in the over-the-top-rope Battle Royal for the WOW World Championship vacated by The Beast. Who will be the last woman standing and NEW WOW World Champion?

programme.desc: A handsome cowboy makes eyes at an immigrant miner's pretty daughter and upsets her staid European ideals. Betrothed by her father to a young miner, she forsakes him and her old-world traditions by leaving home to become an 'American lady.'

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Julie Dixon takes a job as a dealer in Tombstone's Saloon. Here, she deals a grim hand of vengeance. Her brother Sam, an incurable gambler, had killed Julie's lover six months before. She has taken the job as part of a plan to wreak revenge on Sam.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
